title: WAF Rate Limiting Triggered
description: Detects WAF rate limiting events indicating automated attack tools or brute force attempts. Rate limiting is configured at 100 requests per minute for Seven Kingdoms Portal.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Rule Type' = 'REQUEST_RATE_LIMITING'))
falsepositives: Legitimate high-traffic users or API consumers
